name: onnozelaer-claude-marketplace
description: Personally created Claude Code plugins by Onnozelaer.

plugins.name: cabinet-of-imd
plugins.description: The Cabinet of IMD Agents — a flavour layer for Claude Code. Eight college classmates with distinct personalities, voices, disciplines, and pairings serve as specialised web-development agents. v3.0.0 sunsets all functionality (vault writes, session anchors, gate enforcement, state hooks) and keeps only character, voice, and working disciplines. Persistence is delegated to the adjudant plugin when active.

plugins.name: iteration-shelf
plugins.description: Terminal-aesthetic review boards for in-browser design iteration. Generates a curated shelf and a monster index from a JSON manifest — self-contained HTML, zero build step, on-demand iframe loading, sidebar outliner, and a warn-gate that keeps the browser from stalling on 100+ iterations. Explicit invocation only. Integrates with Superpowers and the Cabinet plugin.

plugins.name: cli-wrapper-helper
plugins.description: Build polished CLI tools — interactive bash TUIs (menus, spinners, animations) and clean Python helper scripts (sqlite readers, data reporters). Two separate skills, one consistent visual language.

plugins.name: gemineye
plugins.description: A sandboxed second opinion from Gemini — review-only. Eight subcommands: review, megareview, wip, sanity, name, compare, save, harvest. Gemini proposes edits as code blocks; Claude applies them. harvest extracts 5 durable bullets from any file (transcript, doc, code) — the manual surface for the same pattern adjudant uses automatically at PreCompact. Pairs with adjudant for vault context.

plugins.name: adjudant
plugins.description: Vault editor/writer and project initializer. One skill, one command (/adjudant) with seven verbs (connect, port, sync, check, tidy, ramasse, draw), each backed by a Python helper. v0.5.2 fixes the silently-failing model name in the PreCompact harvest (gemini-3.5-flash → gemini-2.5-flash). v0.5.0 adds PreCompact Gemini harvest: before each compaction, the hook reads the CC transcript and calls Gemini (flash, sandboxed) to extract 5 durable bullets (decisions, blockers, unresolved questions) into _handoff.md. Failure-closed — any error skips harvest, existing sync runs unchanged. v0.4.0 brings: connect.py + sync.py automation, breadcrumb auto-follow, cross-machine portability, inline-code wikilink false-positive fix, hook format alignment. Locked three-tier cleanup model: tidy (surface) / ramasse (structural) / dream (semantic, v0.4+ reserved). Rigid spec, locked tag schema, drift-defense via pre-commit validators.
